= Chests =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Protolith Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Blue Brand Case|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Purple Brand Case|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Orange Brand Case|orange}}
|}

= Currency =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Advanced Recruitment Token}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Amber}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Brand Frag}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Follower}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Form Emblem}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Glorium}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Recruitment Token}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Runestone}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Spore Voucher}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Valley Shard}}
|}

= Protolith =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Devotee Protolith}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Guard Protolith}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Priest Protolith}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Scout Protolith}}
|}

= Stardust =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Stardust|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Stardust|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Stardust|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Stardust|orange}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Protomon]]
